Module 3 - Straight Line Copywriting
This module explores the art and science of ‘selling’ with the written word. Jordan and David
share the methods used to integrate Jordan Belfort’s proprietary script building technology with
online copywriting.
The module also walks through a wildly successful traditional copywriting formula that, when
integrated with the proprietary script building technology, makes for virtually irresistible online
sales copy!
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com
